Vessels with an aggregate carrying amount of $4,407,156 as of December 31, 2019 (December 31, 2018: $4,304,252) have been pledged as collateral under the terms of the Group’s loan agreements (Note 13).

As of December 31, 2019, a number of increasingly strong negative indicators such as the difference between ship broker estimates of the fair market values and the carrying values of the Group’s Steam vessels, the lack of liquidity in the market for term employment for Steam vessels and reduced expectations for the estimated rates at which such term employment could be secured, together with the continued addition of modern, larger and more fuel efficient LNG carriers to the global fleet, prompted the Group to perform an impairment assessment of its vessels in accordance with the
